mentions.note: CEO Jim Conroy's merchandising, marketing, and in-store improvements driving 17% comp growth, 20% revenue growth, 27% earnings growth. Best performer in off-price space; 47% gain since he arrived. Off-price retail is one of few retail sectors working. Worth owning.
Had best numbers of discount retail group but one of worst S&P performers; illogical selling; head-scratcher.
